title: Settings Family Schema
description: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 1 — populated settings family schema. Site-level settings, the three-form ProcoreCompanyId contract (canonical, surface, business — default 5280, configuration not secret), Microsoft 365 / Teams connection posture (frozen for MVP), Procore authentication posture (DMSA, secrets in backend only), and Project Site Configuration bucketing. Field set traces verbatim to fields/families/settings.fields.json and Standard Project Site Template Contract §10, §10.6, §11.6, §15.2, §18.1.5. mvp_status binds to the canonical Decision Closure four-value enum (VR-24).

settingsSections.description: Catalog of settings sections from §10.1 (13 governance sections: General Project Profile, Modules & Navigation, Team & Access, Permission Templates, Libraries & Document Areas, External Integrations, Startup/Closeout Templates, Permits & Inspections, Responsibility Matrix, Notifications/Escalations, Data Validation, Site Health/Repair, Template Version/Drift).

procoreCompanyId_canonical.description: Canonical-layer field name 'procore_company_id'. Default 5280. Configuration, not secret. VR-10. Three-form contract per Contract §10.6 / §18.1.5.

procoreCompanyId_surface.description: SharePoint-surface field name 'ProcoreCompanyId'. Default 5280. Configuration, not secret. VR-10.

procoreCompanyId_business.description: Business label. Configuration, not secret. VR-10.

ProcoreProjectId.description: Procore project ID. Owner: PM (fallback PX) per VR-11. Runtime Configuration.

ProcoreProjectUrl.description: Procore project URL; auto-generated where possible. Runtime Configuration.

EnabledProcoreSubjectAreas.description: Array of subject area enums. Defaults to Enabled=false. Runtime Configuration.

SyncCadence.description: Per subject area sync cadence. Runtime Configuration.

SyncProfile.description: Named sync profile (e.g., MVP-mapping-only, RecommendedPractical-Wave1). Runtime Configuration.

ToolDeepLinks.description: Auto-generated deep links to Procore tools. Read-only in PCC. Runtime Configuration.

LastSyncStatus.description: Last sync status. Read-only in PCC. Runtime Configuration.

LastSuccessfulSync.description: UTC timestamp of last successful sync. Runtime Configuration.

ConfiguredBy.description: UPN of last configurator; should reflect assigned PM (or PX fallback). VR-11. Project Accountant is NOT the mapping owner.

ConfiguredDate.description: UTC timestamp of last configuration change.

RedactedErrorSummary.description: Plain-language error message; never raw payload, token, or URL with secrets. VR-13.

M365GroupConnected.description: Project sites are M365 Group / Teams connected by default. VR-28; frozen for MVP.

GlobalReadOnlyAddedToTeams.description: Always false; Global Read-Only Entra group not added to project Teams. VR-28.

ITAutoAddedToTeams.description: Always false; IT/admin not auto-added to project Teams. VR-28.

ProcoreAuthMethod.description: DMSA (Procore Direct Mobile Service Account); backend-held credentials. Configuration only; secrets live in backend, never in SharePoint / SPFx / markdown / repo. VR-13.

ProcoreSecretStorageLocation.description: Backend secret-management surface; never in SharePoint, SPFx, markdown, or client config. VR-13. No-secret guardrail.

configBucket.description: Project Site Configuration bucket. Bucket A is read-only to non-IT. VR-17 (no-native-SharePoint-admin posture). §15.2.

lastModifiedBy.description: UPN of last modifier of a configuration row.

decisionClosureStatus.description: Canonical Decision Closure Register status — VR-24.

procoreSubjectArea.description: Procore subject area enum from Contract §15.13.2.
